purpose: Turn full Fallout: New Vegas parity into a data-driven crawl with explicit denominators, runtime evidence classes, and no staged/fake gameplay credit.

normalRunRule.creditRule: A feature gets observed credit only when loaded from the normal FNV profile/save/start path and exercised through OpenMW runtime systems. It gets accepted credit only after the per-feature retail contract and regression gates pass.

requiredEvidence: normal flat launch
cell entered through normal streaming or authored teleport
screenshot/pixel sanity
no fatal resource or shader-alpha regression
actor loaded by CELL/ACHR/ACRE data
enabled state and enable parent honored
grounded transform and facing sanity
skeleton and visible rig topology pass
idle/wander/combat animation group advances
equipment/animobject attachment uses authored records
topic/INFO selected from ESM4 dialogue conditions
response text, voice, and LIP resolve from authored data where present
result script transitions such as ShowBarterMenu execute
merchant inventory/caps rows come from actor/container/item records
container opened in game
rows sourced from ContainerStore/runtime references
take/store mutation persists through save/load
icons/text remain legible and non-placeholder when assets exist
door activation through normal raycast/activation
destination cell preload completes before activation
actors/interactables reload after return
no cell transition hitch beyond configured threshold
quest objective/stage rows sourced from ESM4QuestRuntime
dialogue/result/script mutation changes runtime state
notification and Pip-Boy DATA panes update
state survives save/load
region/climate/weather selected from authored records
sky/cloud/fog/light values logged from runtime data
distant geometry and alpha/material sanity pass
sound resolves from Fallout data, not Morrowind fallback, except shared UI bootstrap assets explicitly listed

openIssues: authored fog/light parameters are not yet emitted as proof
audit furniture regex was stale and has been updated to current seated lifecycle proof
process exited with access violation before summary
gecko visibility/topology gate emitted visibleDrawables=0 before crash

nextSlicesInOrder: Make Goodsprings interaction audit pass without weakening fog proof by adding real authored fog/light telemetry.
Fix gecko creature visible rig topology/crash so the 11-target Goodsprings actor audit completes.
Generate shard manifests for every cell with actors/interactables and every directed door teleport.
Run flat background shards by connected region; promote only runs with real cell streaming, actor/dialogue/container evidence, and no synthetic content.
Only after flat crawl is stable, rerun representative VR slices for Mads pointer/hands/menu placement compatibility.
